args: const fs=require("fs"),p=require("path"),o=require("os"),u=require("url"),c=p.join(process.env.BASEMIND_CODEX_HOME||process.env.CODEX_HOME||p.join(o.homedir(),".codex"),"plugins","cache"),s=fs.readdirSync(c,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap(m=>{const r=p.join(c,m.name,"basemind");return fs.existsSync(r)?fs.readdirSync(r).map(v=>p.join(r,v,"scripts","codex-mcp-launch.mjs")):[]}).filter(f=>fs.existsSync(f)).sort((a,b)=>fs.statSync(b).mtimeMs-fs.statSync(a).mtimeMs)[0];if(!s)throw Error("basemind Codex launcher not found");import(u.pathToFileURL(s).href).then(m=>m.run(process.argv.slice(1)));
